name: Pecan Crispies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and shortening together until smooth.
2. Gradually add the brown sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the eggs until well combined.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, salt, and baking soda (if used).
5. Add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, mixing well.
6. Stir in the chopped pecans.
7. Using a spoon, drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto lightly greased cookie sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 to 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Allow the cookies to cool slightly on the baking sheet before transferring them to wire racks.
Makes 5 dozen.
